goal: Split src/adapters.ts (399 LOC, at the 400-line file-size cap) into a thin facade plus focused modules under src/adapters/, each <400 lines. The facade re-exports the public API so no caller changes. Keep 100% line+branch coverage and all existing tests green.

work_units.name: split-adapters
work_units.spec: Extract cohesive groups (context builders, canonical/engine/agent file generators, dispatch-prompt) from src/adapters.ts into src/adapters/*.ts. src/adapters.ts becomes a re-export facade. Every existing import keeps working. Run `bun run check` — typecheck, lint, full test suite, and 100% per-file coverage must pass.
